title: taraxacum salinum
intro: Taraxacum salinum, also known as saltwort dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum salinum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and act as a natural diuretic to remove excess fluids from the body. Taraxacum salinum is often prepared as a tea or infusion to reap its benefits, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
